DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S FURTHER RESPONSES TO FIRST SET OF INTERROGATORIES, FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND FULLY WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,476.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (612/EAHEWLETT)
